prompt: Analyze the image and return STRICT JSON with keys: objects (JSON array of strings; list all identifiable objects, use [] if none), location (select from [bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, living room, dining room, storeroom]), handsInTheView (boolean), activityLabel (a single English -ing word). Return only raw JSON (do NOT use code fences like ```json), no extra text. Example: {"objects": ["knife", "tomato"], "location": "kitchen", "handsInTheView": true, "activityLabel": "cutting"}.
